documents.topic: RFC_8259 text-parser hotspots at stdlib-scale inputs; debug vs release framing, allocation reduction, Span-cursor path; v1.1.0 records measured −27% wall-clock after Tiers 0/1/3 landing

Tier-4 architecture design: Span<UInt8>-specialized internal lexer for RFC_8259 to reach ≤1.3× Foundation on stdlib-scale inputs. Enumerates three architectures (Span + existing tree; Span + arena tree; RawSpan + table + lazy + arena), recommends Architecture A (internal Span cursor mirroring Binary.Bytes.Input.View, lazy position computation, dispatch fork in RFC_8259.Decode), with conditional Phase B arena tree as a separate arc if measurement gate trips.

narrativeSections.heading: See also
narrativeSections.body: Modularization audit findings (MOD-010 stdlib extensions, MOD-011 test support) live in `swift-foundations/swift-json/Audits/audit.md` rather than `Research/`; the audit was incorrectly indexed here from 2026-03-20 to 2026-05-13 and has been moved to its correct home.
